Package com.nib.motorhead.redis

Class RedisCluster

java.lang.Object
com.nib.motorhead.redis.AbstractRedisService
com.nib.motorhead.redis.RedisCluster
All Implemented Interfaces:
IMotorheadCluster
public class RedisCluster extends AbstractRedisService implements IMotorheadCluster
